title: H7 Updater — sovereign vs personal lanes
motto: ZacharyGeurts writes sovereign stack only. Everyone else connects their GitHub read-only.

sovereign_write.policy: Only the sovereign owner may push to ZacharyGeurts/* repos. H7updater never requests write scope.

sovereign.label: Sovereign catalog
sovereign.description: Official field stack from ZacharyGeurts — public API, no login required.

personal.label: Your GitHub
personal.description: Authorize read-only access to your repos and releases. Updates apply to your machine only — never to ZacharyGeurts.

oauth_app.redirect_uri_note: Device flow — no redirect URI required. Enable for your account or org; read-only scopes only.
